===================
===================
=== Dylan - Toronto, Ontario  June 5th 1990 (JTT)_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Toronto, Ontario  June 5th 1990 "Transfer from 2nd Generation Tape (JTT)"

Bob Dylan
O'Keefe Centre For The Performing Arts
Toronto, Ontario
June 5th 1990

Very Good Stereo Audience Recording.

Source: Taper (Master Cassette) > Cassette (?) > BASF C90 Chrome Cassettes (Dolby C) >
Sony D6 (Dolby C Playback) > Soundforge 8 (Track Marks, Fades, Joins) > CDR > EAC >
FLAC Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

Note: Problems found.
2-3 sec. cut at start of Track 9, Disc 1.
2-3 sec. cut at 6.08 Track 9, Disc 1.
A few secs. cut at start of Track 8, Disc 2.

These cuts have been smoothed to give improved listening experience.

Transferred from 2nd Generation Tape by JTT, November 2006

Disc One
01 Subterranean Homesick Blues
02 I'll Remember You
03 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
04 Tears Of Rage
05 Masters Of War
06 Gotta Serve Somebody
07 Tomorrow Is A Long Time
08 Desolation Row
09 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
10 John Brown
11 One Too Many Mornings

Disc Two
01 Everything Is Broken
02 Simple Twist Of Fate
03 All Along The Watchtower
04 I Shall Be Released
05 Like A Rolling Stone
06 Barbara Allen
07 The Times They Are A-Changin'
08 Highway 61 Revisited
===================
===================
===================
